text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It feels like just yesterday when<n>Falco and the
others stood up there<n>and...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's it! Let's all sing together!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So glad to have you, Suzuka! Let's do<n>this!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Songs have the power to convey<n>feelings. So just
sing with all your<n>heart, and I promise you'll do
great!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I just know we'll get new recruits<n>today! There
have to be more girls<n>like us who want to sing a
big "thank<n>you"!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. I'm confident this concert will<n>be another
success. It must be!
